name: Hungarian Noodles and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Noodles; cooked of your choice - whole wheat, udon, Jerusalem artichoke or other type
recipeInstructions:
1. The combination of cabbage and noodles pleases the palate. In preparing this dish, sautee the cabbage and onions separately to bring out the flavor of each food.
2. Saute the cabbage in 2 tablespoons corn oil for about 15 minutes. Set aside.
3. In a separate pan, saute onions and garlic with salt, pepper, and paprika in the remaining corn oil until the onions are translucent.
4. Stir together the onions, cabbage, and cooked noodles.
5. Reheat and serve hot, garnished with parsley.
SERVES: 4-6
